title: Create a custom trigger to pull data from an external app and feed into Monday
excerpt: Hey Monday Community. I am currently in the process of creating a custom trigger to pull data from an external app, and feed into Monday. I am trying to find sample documentation of someone doing this, and can not find a…

posts.author: shussenet (Sara Hussenet)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Monday Community. I am currently in the process of creating a custom trigger to pull data from an external app, and feed into Monday. I am trying to find sample documentation of someone doing this, and can not find any. Can anyone lead me in the right direction? Thank you!

posts.author: Chrism99 (Chris Medina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @shussenet,

Do you happen to know your API token for Monday?
